natural_language: Every employee must have exactly 1 day-off per week
Employee must have rest period over 8 hrs a day
Exactly 1 cashier and at least 2 services in one shift
Employee prefer 8 hours shift. Strong penalty for 12 hours shifts.
No repeated Shift pattern on consecutive days (e.g. if A work 00:00-08:00 on Mon, they shouldn't work same shift on Tue).
